title: VPN Warner
description: Warns you before joining a server if you're connected to a VPN to prevent having your account punished by AntiVPN plugins/mods.
body:
# VPN Warner

This mod warns you if you have a VPN process/service running before joining a multiplayer server.
It only persists across one join so you don't toggle a VPN on between joins and forget about it.

There's no config menu/file for now.
